zh.lifeSummary: 當Rev. Bartholomew Allerton於1612年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德萊登時，他的父親Isaac Allerton27歲，母親Mary Norris24歲。他於1627年住在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯。他去世於1658年10月15日之後在英國英格蘭素福爾可布拉費爾德，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可布拉費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rev. Bartholomew Allerton于1612年出生在荷兰-拉藍德萊登时，他的父亲Isaac Allerton27岁，母亲Mary Norris24岁。他于1627年住在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯。他去世于1658年10月15日之后在英国英格兰素福爾可布拉費爾德，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可布拉費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Allerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of several places so called. Allerton on Merseyside, Chapel Allerton in Yorkshire, and others in Yorkshire were named in Old English as alra tūn ‘settlement by the alders’. One in Somerset (Alwarditone in Domesday Book) is ‘Ælfweard's settlement’; one in Yorkshire (Allerton Mauleverer, Alvertone in Domesday Book) is ‘Ælfhere's settlement’.

variants.name: Alderton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of a number of places called Alderton. Those in Suffolk and Shropshire (Alretuna in Domesday Book) are named with Old English alor + tūn, meaning ‘the settlement by the alders’. Those in Gloucestershire, Northamptonshire, and Wiltshire are named with the Old English personal name Ealdhere, meaning ‘settlement associated with Ealdhere’. The one in Essex contains a different personal name, probably the woman's name Æthelwaru. In England, the surname is most common in East Anglia, making the places in Suffolk and Essex the most likely sources.

nameMeanings.name: Bartholomew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin, the name of an apostle mentioned in all the synoptic gospels (Matthew, Mark, and Luke) and in the Acts of the Apostles. It is an Aramaic formation meaning ‘son of Talmai’, and has been assumed by many scholars to be a byname of the apostle Nathaniel . Talmai is a Hebrew name, said to mean ‘abounding in furrows’ (Numbers 13:22).

historicEvents.description: Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

en.lifeSummary: When Rev. Bartholomew Allerton was born in 1612, in Leiden, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Isaac Allerton, was 27 and his mother, Mary Norris, was 24. He lived in Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States in 1627. He died after 15 October 1658, in Bramfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Bramfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rev. Bartholomew Allerton est né en 1612, à Leiden, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Isaac Allerton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mary Norris, avait 24 ans. Il a vécu à Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1627. Il est décédé après 15 octobre 1658, à Bramfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Bramfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Bartholomew Allerton 1612 in Leiden, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Isaac Allerton 27 und seine Mutter Mary Norris 24. 1627 hat er in Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb nach 15. Oktober 1658 in Bramfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bramfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rev. Bartholomew Allerton è nato il nel 1612 nel Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Isaac Allerton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mary Norris, aveva 24 anni. Vissuto a Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1627. Morì dopo il 15 ottobre 1658, nel Bramfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Bramfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Rev. Bartholomew Allertonが1612年にオランダズイド-hオランドレイデンで生まれた時，父Isaac Allertonは27歳，母Mary Norrisは24歳であった。彼は1627年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスに住んでいた。彼は1658年10月15日以後にイギリスイギリススフォルクブラムフィールドで死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクブラムフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rev. Bartholomew Allerton(이)가 1612년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 레이든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Isaac Allerton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Norris(은)는 24세였다. 1627년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스에서 살았다. 그는 1658년 10월 15일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브램필드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브램필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rev. Bartholomew Allerton nasceu em 1612, em Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Isaac Allerton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mary Norris, tinha 24 anos. Ele viveu em Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1627. Ele faleceu após 15 de outubro de 1658, em Bramfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Bramfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rev. Bartholomew Allerton родился в 1612 г. в местности лиден, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Isaac Allerton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Norris, 24. Он жил в местности плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1627 году. Он умер после 15 октябрь 1658 г. в местности брамфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности брамфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rev. Bartholomew Allerton nació en 1612, en Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Isaac Allerton, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mary Norris, tenía 24 años. Vivió en Plymouth, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1627. Murió después de 15 de octubre de 1658, en Bramfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Bramfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
